title: Apex PvP
description: A clean, vanilla style texture pack for PvP, that boosts FPS and works on lots of versions!
body:
Click [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/apex-pvp-clean-textures-stable-fps-bedrock-edition/) to download the Bedrock Version!\
Apex PvP is a PvP texture pack focused on bringing everything you need for PvP, and only the things you need.\
I noticed that PvP texture packs have a lot of random things that don't help you with PvP, and decrease FPS, some even being 32x or higher.\
This texture pack only brings the things you need, and also boosts FPS!\
The supported versions are 1.8.9 and 1.18 and forwards. (Most packs are only for 1.8.9, which is mostly a PvP-oriented version, but people still like modern versions.)\
Some things included in this pack:
- Short swords
- Ore borders (works with any resource pack on 1.18x)
- Wool borders
- Better crosshair for accuracy and performance
- Lower totem
- Lower shield
- Lower axes
- Low fire
- Unobtrusive particles and weather
- Unobtrusive clouds
- No pumpkin blur
- No vignette
- Unobtrusive scaffolding (works with any resource pack on 1.18x)
- Arabic numerals (things like III -> 3)
- Optimized models (gain lots more FPS!)
- Numbered hotbar
- Colored ping display (for example 3 bars on the ping would be orange)
- Suspicious sand and gravel borders
- And much more!
Questions:\
Why should I use this pack?\
This pack only changes necessary things and has a good FPS boost. It is also more flexible and can be used on lots of versions.

My FPS doesn't get boosted!\
This pack does boost FPS, but in cases where there is lots of lag from things like high entity count, it won't be as noticeable. If you are using 1.8.9, that version is very unoptimized and is laggy on some low-end computers (it still boosts FPS though). Try using [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) with this pack.
